name: Tiny Tapeout :: Quicker, easier and cheaper to make your own chip!

name: Tiny Tapeout sees industrial boost as it recovers from eFabless
snippet: The Tiny Tapeout programme is bouncing back from recent problems with a survey that shows a dramatic increase in industrial engagements.

name: Efabless shuts down, fate of Tiny Tapeout chip production projects
snippet: Efabless, a company which broke down the barriers of the computer chip creation process for enthusiasts and smaller players, has abruptly shut down.
